allow_auto_provision.name: Generic OIDC - Allow Auto Provision
allow_auto_provision.remark: Whether unknown directory users may be auto-provisioned. Allowed values: true, false.

client_id.name: Generic OIDC - Client ID
client_id.remark: OAuth/OIDC client identifier issued by the identity provider.

client_secret.name: Generic OIDC - Client Secret
client_secret.remark: OAuth/OIDC client secret. Leave blank or masked to keep the existing value.

connection_key.name: Generic OIDC - Connection Key
connection_key.remark: Stable connection identifier used by the host external-login seam.

default_backend_redirect.name: Generic OIDC - Default Backend Redirect
default_backend_redirect.remark: Default post-login backend redirect target when backend redirect is enabled.

display_name.name: Generic OIDC - Display Name
display_name.remark: Login entry label shown to end users.

issuer.name: Generic OIDC - Issuer
issuer.remark: OIDC issuer URL used for discovery and token validation.

redirect_url.name: Generic OIDC - Redirect URL
redirect_url.remark: OAuth/OIDC callback URL registered with the identity provider.

scopes.name: Generic OIDC - Scopes
scopes.remark: Space-separated OAuth/OIDC scopes requested during authorization.
